step_rationale: Glycolytic regulator and ACS biomarker; elevated glycolysis drives macrophage activation and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: PFKFB3 upregulation couples glycolytic metabolism to inflammatory macrophage activation, amplifying plaque destabilization.

references.title: Novel Biomarker Identification for Acute Coronary Syndrome via Integrating WGCNA and Machine Learning.
